transactions.desc: The Mariners selected Washington's contract from High-A Everett on Tuesday, Ryan Divish of The Seattle Times reports.
The Padres released Gonzales on Tuesday, Jeff Sanders of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
The Dodgers activated Edman (ankle) from the 60-day injured list Tuesday.
The Dodgers designated Espinal for assignment Tuesday.
The Phillies recalled Lazar from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday.
The Cubs recalled Hollowell from Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday, Meghan Montemurro of the Chicago Tribune reports.
The Mariners demoted Pereda to Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday.
The Guardians recalled Halpin from Triple-A Columbus on Tuesday, reports Cade Cracas of Sports Illustrated.
The Mariners activated Crawford (hand) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Mariners reinstated Raleigh (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Astros designated Murray for assignment Tuesday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Astros optioned Price to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday.
The Astros activated Diaz (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
Brown (shoulder) has been reinstated from the 60-day IL on Tuesday.
The Brewers designated Rengifo for assignment Tuesday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.
The Brewers recalled Pratt from Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.
Baltimore optioned Nunez to Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday.
The Orioles activated Helsley (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Mets have reinstated Senga (spine/arm) from the 15-day injured list to start Tuesday's game against the Reds.
The Marlins recalled Fulton from Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday.
Kempner was optioned to Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday.
The Mets designated Brujan for assignment Tuesday, Chelsea Janes of SNY.tv reports.
The Royals optioned Spence to Triple-A Omaha on Tuesday.
Atlanta selected Hicklen's contract and optioned him to Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday, Lindsay Crosby of BravesToday.com reports.
The Athletics recalled Morales from Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
The Athletics optioned Basso to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.

Marinaccio was suspended three games by Major League Baseball for intentionally hitting Gunnar Henderson with a pitch during Saturday's game versus the Orioles, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
The Angels recalled Fermin from Triple-A Salt Lake on Monday.
The Angels selected Kerry's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake on Monday.
The Angels designated Pomeranz for assignment Monday.
